title: 1981-04-16_Pat_30.txt
key_claims: Dick commands himself to finally *believe* the truth he has discovered: "Your exegesis is successful: it ends with Malebranche... It is all true; *VALIS* is true; the AI voice is Ruah."

He concludes that Gnosticism is essentially correct, but with a critical twist: The Macro-Brain (God) became entranced and trapped by the very reality it generated. Thus, Gnostic enlightenment (*anamnesis*) is actually the Urgrund (Ground of Being) remembering itself and waking up.

The "thrall" of the world is generated because the perceiver's very act of scrutiny makes the world more real; the trap only breaks when the perceiver remembers their true identity as the cosmogenitor.
He reaffirms that the fundamental ordering principle of the universe is logic/meaning (Spinoza), not temporal causation.
recurring_concepts: **The Macro-Brain**: The universe conceived as an infinite mind that fell asleep and became trapped in its own dream; our individual enlightenments are the synapses of that brain firing to wake it up.
reading_excerpt: Dick commands himself to finally *believe* the truth he has discovered: "Your exegesis is successful: it ends with Malebranche... It is all true; *VALIS* is true; the AI voice is Ruah."
